title: Polhillia involucrata
uses: Polhillia involucrata has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including treating fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. Its leaves and roots are often used in herbal remedies to reduce inflammation and combat infections. The plant is also believed to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which may contribute to its potential health benefits. However, more research is needed to fully understand the medicinal uses and potential applications of Polhillia involucrata. taxonomy: Polhillia involucrata is classified within the family Rubiaceae. It belongs to the order Gentianales.
